patient_name.description: Patient identity must be exact before results are posted to a chart.

patient_mrn.description: MRN is the primary chart-matching key for lab result ingestion.

report_date.description: Report date drives result timeliness and audit chronology.

lab_clia_number.description: CLIA identifier is required for performing-lab auditability.

test_results.description: Result rows contain clinical values, flags, ranges, and statuses; errors can alter clinical interpretation.

critical_values_present.description: Critical value flags drive urgent notification workflow.
